1.premise: Running out of toilet paper can force clothing to serve double duty.
Without toilet paper, clothing could be repurposed as emergency wipes.

2.premise: Having one sock left implies it is on the foot, but reveals it is covering the genitals.

1.premise: "Barely legal" can mean barely of legal age or barely permitted by historical law.
